title: 4 Nights Stay In Como With Breakfast
description:
This package deal includes a four-night stay in the city of Como, a picture-perfect slice of paradise nestled at the southern tip of Lake Como in the north of Italy. 

A unique and unforgettable destination, Como boasts idyllic gardens, palatial villas and museums aplenty. While away the hours wandering the lakeside gardens of the neoclassical Villa Olmo, gazing at the beautiful Gothic Como Cathedral or strolling along the scenic waterfront promenade in search of something tasty to have for dinner, before bedding down at the Hotel Barchetta Excelsior. 

A four-star resort surrounded by beauty from all angles, it’s the only hotel in Como with more than 50 rooms looking out directly onto the sparkling lake. Lose yourself in the scenery for hours on end from the comfort of your room. 

In the mornings, you’ll tuck into a hearty hotel breakfast before heading out to explore. The great thing about the Barchetta Excelsior is that it’s extremely conveniently located – within spitting distance of the Cathedral, city centre and shopping centre, making it the perfect springboard for getting out and about.

In addition, the elegant American bar is perfect

title: 4 Star Holiday In Lake Como
description:
Lake Como is one of Italy’s first class destinations – a sparkling upscale resort area that cosies up to the foothills of the Alps in the Lombardy region.  

Sprinkled around it are village scenes and picturesque towns, one of which is Cernobbio – around two kilometres northwest of Como itself and the setting for this whirlwind four-night mini-break. 

You’ll be staying at the Hotel Villa Flori, a converted 19th century historic villa on the cusp of Lake Como – views of this eye-opening blue body of water spilling into your room. 

This four-star paradise sits nestled right in the middle of a private park of orange and lemon groves, giving it a real Italian feel. It also boasts Venetian stucco work, floral frescoes and antique furnishings that are enough to evoke the fairy tale feeling that so many travellers seek when in Italy. 

When it comes to meals, you’ll be staying on bed and breakfast basis with a range of treats served up in the dining room daily, panoramic views of the lake before you. What better way to start your day?

Tuck into a daily breakfast served in the elegant dining room and with views of the lake beside you – a wonderfully peaceful way to begin your day.

accommodations.description:
Hotel Villa Flori

It offers elegant rooms with parquet floors and marble bathrooms. All air-conditioned rooms provide flat-screen satellite TV and a minibar. Some rooms feature a balcony and lake views.

A buffet breakfast is available daily in the dining room. Restaurant Raimondi enjoys panoramic lake views, and serves an eclectic mix of international and local cuisine for both lunch and dinner.

title: 4 Star Venice  with Breakfast and Flights
description:
Venice is much more than a tourist attraction. It is a whimsical wonderland binded together by the ethos of its surreal charm, and the magnetism of its fairy tale allure. The quintessential ‘City of Romance’ has the power to alter your thought process and take you into a different world; into the world of fantasies, mystery and awe.

Epic grandeurs, breathtaking scenery, fabulous feasts – When you are in Venice, you are in for the Sojourn of your lifetime. Get mesmerized by the Piazza San Marco, described by Napolean as ‘the drawing room of Europe’, or why not just walk down to the eastern end and feel the grandeur of the St Mark’s Basilica. The most famous of the city’s churches, it has always been revered to as the symbol of Venetian wealth and power..

But the best way to discover the real essence of Venice lies in exploring its beautiful lagoons, the criss crossing canals and some of the most beautiful stone bridges. Get lost in the numerous alleys, or hop on to a Gondola, and let Venice cast a captivating spell on you, which may seem too hard to break in your lifetime….

In this holiday you will stay at the 4 Star Hotel Plaza Venice Mestre. Situated opposite Venice Mestre railway station, Hotel Plaza Venice Mestre is a short drive from the famous Grand Canal and Church of San Salvador.

For something more informal, the modern and stylish Plaza Café provides the perfect setting for an informal brunch, cocktail or appetizing first course dish.

title: 6 Nights Best Cities Of Italy Rome Florence And Venice
description:
One of the joys of traveling through Italy is discovering that it is a dream destination - Debra Lavinso

Every heart beats for this capsule of bygone and changing times. Italian art, architecture and culture have left an unforgettable mark on many. And now the Italian Dream is yours! Why not visit Rome Florence and Venice in just one fantastic trip with 4 Star hotels throughout? 

First up, we fly you to the Eternal City of Rome for two nights at the 4 star The Raganelli Hotel. With round-the-clock energy and jaw-dropping views, Rome offers everything you’ve been dreaming of. Hiding more secrets than its many emperors, from the centre of civilisation to the Roman Empire, this glam city is the hub of awe and wonder.

After thundering across the open vast plains of Italy, your train stops in Florence for a two night hotel stay. In Florence, your stay will be at the 4 Star Hotel Torre Guelfa Palazzo Acciaiuoli.
 Just 100 m from Ponte Vecchio and the Uffizi Gallery you will find this elegant hotel, set in a delightful, 13th-century building. Set in the heart of historic Florence, Hotel Torre Guelfa Palazzo Acciaiuoli mixes old-world charm with modern facilities. Its tower, the tallest in Florence, gives you a unique view over the city and the surrounding hills. Relax with a glass of wine on the terrace after a busy day in Florence.

Our grand voyage concludes with a two night hotel stay in Venice, described by Lonely Planet as “undoubtedly the most beautiful city built by man”. The Smart Hotel Holiday is a comfy design hotel located few minutes far from Venice city centre. Easy to reach from Venezia-Mestre highway exit, this hotel is the ideal base for all those who are travelling by car and want to visit the wonderful Venice and the other cities in the surroundings.

Discover once-in-a-lifetime bespoke Italian experiences with 4 Star hotels for 6 Nights from £299 pp!

title: A Glorious 3 Nights in Rome With Breakfast
description:
Rome is a treasure trove of art, architecture and history – a historical goldmine if ever there was one. From the crumbling stadium of the Colosseum, mesmerizingly haunting, to the bluish, glimmering waters of the Trevi Fountain, there’s so much to see and do, it’s hard to know where to start.

City tours will mean you won't miss out on the must-sees (such as the Pantheon, the Roman Forum and the Palatine Hill) and it’s worth scouting out the best places for melt-in-your-mouth pasta Romana. Whether you’re an amatriciana aficionado or keener on carbonara, there are no shortage of pasta-based dishes to sample here in Rome.

And a trip to Rome isn’t complete without a spellbinding hotel stay – ideally with delightful cuisine and situated not far from all the major sights and landmarks.

Luckily, the Hotel Gambrinus ticks both those boxes. Just a 15-minute walk from the Spanish Steps and Via Veneto and a short bus ride from the Colosseum and the Vatican City, you couldn’t ask for a better location when it comes to exploring the city.

And to top it off, the atmosphere within the hotel is just as lovely as it is outside. Warm, intimate and charming, the hotel is your very own home away from home – from the dazzling daily breakfasts to the charming staff who are full of knowledge on the best city tours and best restaurants, the Hotel Gambrinus offers a relaxing stay with plenty of rest and relaxation.

title: A Half Board Stay In Sardinia With Flights
description:
Wild, unpredictable, but always stunning, it is little surprise that Sardinia tempts travellers back to its shores frequently. The island is perfect for a family trip, to travel with your partner or with friends. Sardinia has a lot to offer. Having a good time is easy; the hard thing is to choose between the wide range of beaches, activities and water sports, traditional restaurants, typical villages and the fascinating insular culture and folklore.

This rocky island off the Italian mainland is a maze of twisting coastal drives, picture-perfect sandy beaches and a fascinating history.

Cala Gonone is a picturesque seaside town on the central east coast of Sardinia, offering an ideal blend of sunny beaches, scenic landscapes and excellent attractions for your Italy holiday. Located 56 kilometres to the east of the famous Costa Esmeralda, Cala Gonone is a useful base from which to explore the beautiful surrounding area. The town is well-equipped to welcome tourists, with a selection of restaurants and bars, while at the harbour boats take holidaymakers along the coast to the bays and beaches in the nearby area.

Your stay during this holiday will be in Hotel Brancamaria. This hotel is located at the entrance to the town of Cala Gonone, in the province of Nuoro, on the central/eastern coast of Sardinia. It is just 900 metres from the town centre, the marina, and the promenade with its picturesque beaches. This charming beach hotel was recently renovated and is extremely well equipped and elegantly decorated in a Mediterranean style. The hotel has an outdoor swimming pool and a sun terrace with parasols. Other sport and leisure activities available to guests include diving, canoeing, tennis and biking. The family-friendly establishment is spacious and bright, ideal for those looking for comfort and tranquillity in a charming and relaxing atmosphere.

title: A Sicilian Getaway: History, Culture And Coastal Bliss
description:
Immerse yourself in the charm and elegance of Sicily with a 3-night stay at Charme Hotel Henry's House, a boutique retreat located on the stunning Ortigia Island in Siracusa. This enchanting getaway offers a perfect blend of relaxation, history, and authentic Sicilian culture.

From the moment you arrive, you'll be captivated by the hotel's unique character, featuring individually designed rooms adorned with antique furnishings and modern comforts. Wake up to breathtaking sea views and savor a delicious Sicilian breakfast on the rooftop terrace, where the beauty of the Ionian Sea unfolds before your eyes.

Discover the vibrant streets of Ortigia, steeped in history and brimming with local markets, architectural wonders, and exquisite dining options. Whether you're exploring ancient landmarks, enjoying a leisurely stroll along the waterfront, or indulging in Sicily’s renowned cuisine, every moment promises to be unforgettable.

This 3-night escape is a celebration of Sicilian charm, offering a serene and romantic atmosphere that will leave you refreshed, inspired, and longing to return.

title: An All Inclusive Stay In Lake Garda With Flights
description:
Stunning scenery, ancient ruins and delicious Italian food – there’s plenty to love about holidays to Lake Garda. Italy’s largest lake attracts artists, celebrities and romantics to its stunning shores. It’s little wonder, as holidays in Lake Garda are set on a backdrop of charming towns and breathtaking natural landscapes.

Stunning rustic scenery and enchanting towns embody the timeless appeal of this majestic lake. Whether you’re looking to unwind as you get to know the café culture, or get active on the water, a Lake Garda holiday is the ideal choice for an idyllic Italian escape. Lake Garda holidays aren’t just about relaxing and enjoying beautiful views but also offer the opportunities for a little fun and excitement. 

Hotel Leonardo da Vinci lies in a large 50,000-m2 park, near to the Limone sul Garda's centre. The Hotel Leonardo da Vinci is made up of several buildings and offers services and facilities for families travelling with children such as, a swimming pool with a slide, trampolines, pingpong tables and an animation team, ready to entertain you.

Go swimming, windsurfing or simply soak up the sun from one of the beaches.

title: An Italian Escape: Florence & Sorrento In Style
description:
Discover the perfect blend of art, history, and coastal beauty with this enchanting Italian getaway.

2 Nights in Florence : Begin your journey in the heart of Tuscany, where the Renaissance was born. Stroll through cobblestone streets lined with architectural masterpieces, admire Michelangelo’s David, explore the iconic Duomo, and soak in the artistic treasures of the Uffizi Gallery. In the evenings, savor authentic Tuscan cuisine in charming trattorias.

Scenic Train Journey to Naples : Travel south by train through picturesque Italian landscapes, from the rolling hills of Tuscany to the sparkling Mediterranean coastline.

3 Nights in Sorrento : Unwind in the stunning seaside town of Sorrento, perched above the Bay of Naples. Wander its colorful streets, indulge in fresh seafood and limoncello, and take in breathtaking views of Mount Vesuvius. From here, you can easily explore Capri, Pompeii, or the Amalfi Coast for unforgettable day trips.

This five-night holiday offers the perfect blend of art, culture and coastal charm, ideal for those seeking a true taste of Italy.

title: Calabria Coastal Bliss at Borgo del Principe
description:
Nestled along the breathtaking Costa degli Dei in Marina di Zambrone, Calabria (Italy), Borgo del Principe by Valentour invites you to enjoy a delightful seaside escape that blends relaxation, nature, and authentic Italian charm. Situated right by a golden-sandy beach with crystal-clear waters, this elegant 4 Star resort offers comfortable, modern accommodations surrounded by lush Mediterranean gardens — an ideal setting for couples, families, and friends alike.

Your days can begin with refreshing dips in the private beach or swimming pool and continue with leisurely walks on the shore, fun family activities, or discovering the vibrant local culture and gastronomy of nearby Tropea and Calabria’s historic towns. Onsite amenities — from entertainment programs and water sports to a kids’ club and evening shows — ensure everyone has something to enjoy. With quality dining featuring local specialties, beach services, and a warm Italian welcome, this getaway promises sun-soaked days and unforgettable memories.

title: Deluxe Rome City Break with Flights
description:
Bella Roma! Ah how it inspires, how it mystifies and how it enriches the mind! It may have not been built in a day but Italy’s magnificent capital sure takes some beating. Italy’s Eternal City has been described by Lonely Planet as “a heady mix of haunting sights, awe-inspiring art and vibrant street life.”  You’ll have the chance to follow in Leonardo da Vinci’s footsteps and experience the old centre of the world in all its brilliance. Rome has got more history than its many emperors, but this city wasn’t built in one day and you’ll soon find a gigantic maze of culture brimming with everlasting brilliance. With round-the-clock energy and jaw-dropping views, Rome offers everything you’ve been dreaming of. Hiding more secrets than its many emperors, from the centre of civilization to the Roman Empire, this glam city is the hub of awe and wonder.

In this fantastic break you will stay at the four-star ARS Hotel. This beautiful historic villa is located in Rome’s Monte Sacro district, just a 20 minute bus ride from Termini Railway Station. After an exciting day taking in Rome’s ancient sights, jaw-dropping architecture and world-class shopping you’ll be able to relax in your spacious room, unwind in the garden terrace or enjoy a Campari in the bar.

This hotel is housed in a beautiful four-storey villa surrounded by a small but beautiful garden that offers superb panoramic views. Getting into the city centre is easy with the Sempione bus stop a few minutes walk, where the 90 Express will take you to Termini Station.

The Hotel “ARS Hotel” is a remarkable example of a building designed in the immediate recovery of the early Twentieth Century.

title: Discover Procida: Italy   S Hidden Gem Of Authentic Charm And Rich Heritage
description:
Head to the small but picturesque island of Procida, situated in the Bay of Naples. Still relatively undiscovered, it offers visitors all the beauty of the Italian islands but without the crowds. Procida is perfectly situated to explore its more famous neighbours, Capri and Ischia as well as Naples and the stunning Amalfi coast, just a short hop away. Despite its small size, Procida has a rich history and vibrant culture that attract visitors looking for a more authentic and less touristy experience. 

 This stunning island has been the setting for several literary works and films and was used a filming location for "Il Postino" and "The Talented Mr. Ripley". Filmmakers were no doubt drawn to its picturesque scenery, the island is known for its colourful houses, charming narrow streets, and beautiful beaches. The Marina Corricella, with its pastel-coloured buildings, draws cinematographers and visitors alike.  

In 2022, Procida was named the Italian Capital of Culture, which brought increased attention to the island and highlighted its cultural and historical significance. This recognition has helped boost its profile as a travel destination, but it still retains a relatively low-key and tranquil atmosphere. 

The deal: This wonderful five-day itinerary includes flights and transfers to the enchanting island of Procida. Embark on a Journey to Procida: The Smallest and Most Colorful Island in the Gulf of Naples Set off to discover Procida, the smallest and most vibrant of the islands in the Gulf of Naples. An idyllic paradise where time seems to stand still, far from the usual tourist routesStroll through its picturesque alleys, immerse yourself in the Mediterranean scents, and embrace an authentic, timeless atmosphere. A place where every corner tells a story, each color evokes emotions, and every flavor leaves an indelible memory. Additionally, you have the opportunity to enrich your experience by visiting Naples and the Amalfi Coast, enhancing your journey with these captivating destinations.
whats_included: We take care of return flights from the UK to Naples
5 Nights in a Double Room with Balcony/Terrace at the Hotel Solcalante
A stay includes Bed and Breakfast Basis
Roundtrip transfers from Naples airport to Procida port
Typical tasting in Procida with “lingua di bue” a local pastry, and Italian original cappuccino.
Procida lemon themed tasting: two drinks per person: limoncello spritz and another lemon cocktail with a platter of typical tastings
highlights: Stay on a charming less "touristy" island
Visit Naples and experience the pizza!
Explore this charming little island on the Amalfi coast

itinerary.title: Arrival Procida
itinerary.description:
Arrive at Naples airport or train station and transfer to the port for the ferry to Procida.
Upon arrival on the island, make your way independently to your nearby hotel. After check-in, enjoy some free time to soak in the authentic atmosphere of Procida, between charming streets and Mediterranean scents.
Overnight in hotel.

itinerary.title: FLAVORS OF PROCIDA
itinerary.description:
After breakfast at the hotel, the day is free to explore the island at your own pace: fishing villages, hidden corners, and scenic views that have inspired writers and filmmakers. Your experience includes tasting the typical “Lingua di bue” with cappuccino at a partner bar located at Procida’s port, for a truly local experience. In the afternoon, enjoy an exclusive lemon-themed aperitif served in the hotel’s garden, where the famous Procida “Pane” Lemon takes center stage, known for its large size and extraordinarily sweet flavor. Savor a refreshing limoncello spritz accompanied by Mediterranean-inspired bites. A relaxing sensory experience combining local nature, flavors, and calm.
Overnight in hotel.

itinerary.title: AMALFI COAST & POMPEII (optional experience to buy as an extra)
itinerary.description:
The excursion starts directly from Procida with a ferry ride to Naples. Upon arrival on the mainland, board a bus and travel together along the stunning Amalfi Coast, between turquoise waters and breathtaking hills. Drive along the Sorrento Coast on a scenic road with photo stops at the most picturesque viewpoints, where you can admire hilltop villages and iconic coastal panoramas.
Along the Amalfi Coast, enjoy a light lunch at a selected local restaurant, prepared with fresh seasonal ingredients. Next, reach Amalfi, an ancient Maritime Republic and the heart of this UNESCO-listed coast. Free time to explore the town at your own pace: visit the Cathedral of Sant’Andrea, stroll its charming streets, or relax along the waterfront. In the afternoon, continue to Pompeii, where you’ll discover one of the world’s most extraordinary archaeological sites. Walk along the ancient streets and visit emblematic sites such as the Forum, the Small Theater, and the Stabian Baths, sharing the experience with the group.
At the end of the visit, return to Naples and board the ferry back to Procida. A full day rich in spectacular views, authentic flavors, and unforgettable moments along the Amalfi Coast and in Pompeii.
Overnight in hotel

itinerary.title: NAPLES WALKING TOUR (optional experience to buy as an extra)
itinerary.description:
In the morning, independently reach the port of Procida and collect your included ferry ticket. Board the ferry to Naples.
Upon arrival, not far from the port in Piazza Municipio near the Fountain of Neptune, meet your guide and begin the tour.
The visit starts in the heart of Naples, walking through streets spanning centuries of history: Greek-origin streets, Roman underground spaces, and the city’s most representative squares reveal a unique blend of cultures and influences.Continue to Piazza del Gesù and Piazza San Domenico Maggiore, where the coexistence of Christian traditions and pagan roots is evident — a fascinating contrast that defines Naples’ identity. This duality is also visible in the artisan shops of San Gregorio Armeno, where every detail tells ancient stories, and in the rich Baroque architecture of the Cathedral. Walk through lively alleys, filled with musicians and characteristic city scents, adding an authentic touch to the experience. In the monumental area, admire landmarks such as Castel Nuovo (Maschio Angioino) and the elegant Neoclassical theatre. Continue through the Galleria and the long avenue that leads to one of Naples’ most iconic squares. At the end of the tour, return to the starting point and board the ferry back to Procida, taking with you the memory of a city rich in history, culture, and vitality — a complete and unforgettable experience.
Overnight in hotel.

itinerary.title: Self Explore Procida
itinerary.description: Breakfast in hotel. We suggest you dedicate a day to individual exploration of the beautiful island of Procida.

itinerary.title: Return to UK
itinerary.description: Enjoy one last hearty breakfast at the hotel before saying goodbye to Procida. You’ll make your way independently to the port, where we’ll provide you with a ferry ticket back to Naples. Upon arrival, a transfer will take you to the airport for your journey home.

accommodations.name: Hotel Solcalante
accommodations.description: Hotel Solcalante in Procida offers a tranquil stay with panoramic views and a focus on relaxation. Facilities include comfortable rooms, a wellness area with a sauna and hot tub, and a lovely outdoor pool. Guests can savor local cuisine at the hotel's restaurant, which emphasizes fresh, regional ingredients. The hotel also features a sun terrace and garden, providing ample space to unwind. Conveniently located, Solcalante allows easy access to Procida's attractions and scenic spots.

title: Discover Puglia: The Untouched Beauty Of Southern Italy
description:
Puglia’s coastline is vast, stretching hundreds of kilometres and studded with sun-soaked beaches. This southern region forms the heel of Italy’s “boot” and has bucket-loads of charm – from its whitewashed hilltop towns to its awe-inspiring cave complexes and national parks. 

You’ve got historically-rich towns such as Bari and Lecce, full of character; then, alongside them is striking architecture – like the “trulli" of Alberobello (cone-shaped buildings, some of which date back to the 14th century) and the Castel del Monte, a 13th century citadel sitting atop a hill in Andria.

The area is a great place for holidaymakers that want to relax and do nothing, but also those who are eager explorers. With history oozing out of its pores in the form of time-ravaged architecture, as well as glittery shorelines that'll have you falling head over heels, Puglia entices every kind of traveller.

When you’re not out sightseeing or snorkelling off Baia dell'Orte (included in your package, weather permitting), flop down on a lounger by the beach or pool of the 4* Relais Masseria Le Cesine. 

Doze off on a lounger by the edge of the twinkly pool, pamper yourself at the  spa facilities and stroll along the coastline.
whats_included: Return flights from UK to Puglia

Go on a mini catamaran cruise to Baia dell'Orte and stop off to snorkel in wonderfully transparent waters.
Head off sightseeing to some of Puglia's towns and cities, such as Ostuni, Otranto and Alberobello – the latter of which is home to the famous whitewashed “trulli" cone-shaped buildings.

Relais Masseria Le Cesine - CDSHotels

 Relais Masseria Le Cesine is a family 4-star venue set in a resort area of Vernole. It is about 5 miles away from the center of Vernole. The property is located near a bus stop. Guests can reach Relais Masseria Le Cesine by car from Galatina airport in 30 minutes.

The accommodation has annex rooms with air conditioning, a balcony and a trouser press for your comfortable stay.

Guests will enjoy a spa center, a solarium and a Jacuzzi at this hotel, which also has a sun terrace, a patio and a shared lounge. Outdoor recreation is abundant in the area, including diving, snorkeling and horse riding.

Unwind and embrace the ambiance of Vernole in the beach restaurant onsite. The on-site bar features karaoke and a terrace.

title: Discover Sicily: Ancient Charm, Modern Magic
description:
For holiday seekers looking for a memorable Mediterranean holiday, the island of Sicily, located at the tip of Italy's boot, provides the whole package. Sicily is the largest island in the Mediterranean, and has all the charm and history of a holiday in Italy with its own unique culture, away from the mainland. A long coastline full of gorgeous beaches, legendary food and some of the finest art and culture around, it is a great destination for all tastes. Not forgetting the weather – the sunshine is pretty amazing, too.

Located near the archaeological park of Ancient Naxos, Hotel Caesar Palace lies just 1 km from Giardini Naxos’ beachfront and is conveniently linked to the centre of the town.

High-quality services, designed for a family holiday in Sicily. The property has an entertainment programme, areas for children, partner beach, two swimming pools, sports, culture and nature packages for day trips.

Stay for 7 nights at 4 Star Hotel Caesar Palace, Giardini Naxos

accommodations.name: Hotel Caesar Palace
accommodations.description:
Hotel Caesar Palace

 The hotel is ideally located within easy reach of famed points of interest in Sicily, including the cities of Taormina, Catania and Messina. The hotel has a seaside beach, Lido Naxos Beach. Situated in on the seafront of Giardini Naxos, the beach is only 1.2 km from the hotel. Giardini Naxos itself is renowned for its ancient archaeological sites.

All-air conditioned rooms come with a flat-screen TV and a kettle. The bathroom has a bath, free toiletries and a hairdryer.

You can start your day with a sweet and savoury buffet breakfast. The complex has its own restaurant with buffet service, a grill and pizzeria by the swimming pool (open in summertime) and an a la carte gourmet restaurant.

title: Escape to Ischia: An Island of Beauty and Relaxation
description:
The prodigious properties of Ischia’s waters have been well-known since ancient Roman times and even then, the island was probably one of the most famous thermal stations for the healing of both body and soul. Ischia is tradition, hospitality and undisputed beauty to be appreciated with your own eyes and enjoyed at your own pleasure. The island boasts delightful views over the sparkling Mediterranean and fine sandy beaches. Holidays to Ischia are ideal for those looking for a respite with the islands fantastic beaches and range of exclusive spas.

With breakfast and dinner covered, you’re free to spend the day as you like, enjoying your holiday with no obligation to trek back to the hotel for lunch. You’ll also be able to make the most of the local restaurants and cafés, trying out the local cuisine.

During this holiday, you will stay at the  Hotel La Ginestra. The hotel is located in a marvelous position on the Saint Angelo Bay. It was one of the first hotel built in the nice location of Panza. The hotel has been modified and renovated several times and today it is one of the most comfortable hotels of the whole area. Set on the southern coast of the island, it is within walking distance of the famous Maronti beach and to the large beach at Citara, with its Poseidon Spa Gardens. The picturesque bay of Sorgeto with its hot spa springs can also be reached easily. While the centre of Forio d'Ischia, Sant'Angelo beach and Sant'Angelo Bay can all be reached within a 10-minute drive and offer plenty of restaurants and open-air cafes. Guests that a looking to relax around a thermal outdoor swimming pool shouldn't have to move outside of the hotel, it not only offers it but features a lovely balcony with panoramic views.

accommodations.name: Hotel La Ginestra
accommodations.description:
Hotel La Ginestra

 Set in the village of Panza in south-western Ischia, Hotel La Ginestra features a restaurant serving typical Italian cuisine. Hotel La Ginestra is 1.2 km from Sorgeto's thermal hot springs, and 4 km from Citara beach. The fishing village of Ischia Ponte is a 30-minute drive away.
The simply furnished rooms at La Ginestra Hotel are air-conditioned and provide satellite TV and free WiFi. They also have a private bathroom each, and some offer a view over Sant'Angelo Bay.
This hotel offers on-site breakfast in the restaurant. You can also dine at the à la carte restaurant, which serves Italian meals. Enjoy a lounge and a spacious terrace in the Poolside bar. A number of restaurants, including Sole Nascente and Il Ritrovo, are located in the surrounding area, 250 metres away

title: Escape to Puglia: Where Tradition Meets Tranquility
description:
Ask any Italian what their favourite destination is and the answer you will surely get is Puglia. Whoever you ask they will gasp in delight, “The beaches! You haven’t lived until you’ve dipped into the sparkling clear waters of Puglia!” And who wouldn’t follow an Italian’s advice?  So if you crave a destination with a real sense of place, yet still desire beach luxury and all the local comforts it entails, Pietrablu Resort & SPA is the hotel for you.

A welcoming family resort, the Pietrablu Resort & SPA looks out over the sea with large gardens and the white architecture harking back to local tradition. The splendid coastal area of Polignano a Mare hosts the Pietrablu Resort & SPA, which is built right on the seashore, amidst lawns, olive trees and small trulli. Don’t miss a visit to the beautiful small hamlet, just 5 km from the resort, which stands on the sea with its charming walled historic centre. The location of the resort makes it easy to visit Alberobello, Ostuni, Castellana Grotte, Conversano, Fasano and Bari.

During the day, you can relax at the small private beach, hire a canoe, or take part in sports tournaments.During the day, you can relax at the small private beach, hire a canoe, or take part in sports tournaments.

title: Escape to Sicily: A Mediterranean Paradise Awaits
description:
Escaping to Sicily, an island just off the ‘toe’ of Italy’s ‘boot’ and the largest one in the Mediterranean, is like entering a dream world – one where history lurks around every corner and dramatic volcanic landscapes collide with miles and miles of peaceful coastline. 

The Valley of the Temples and the Cappella Palatina with its Byzantine mosaics invite endless wandering, while the Nebrodi and Madonie Mountains offer a different kind of wandering. From salt flats to seaside towns, Sicily offers sightseeing for the masses – whether you’re a beach-bum at heart or a secret history buff. 

And as if that wasn’t enough, the food there is to die for. Picture mouth-watering desserts (Sicilians are some of the best dessert-makers in Italy) such as cannoli and cassata, as well as succulent arancini (fried rice balls with fillings) piled high on plates. 

When you’re not hunkering down over delicious dishes or gazing up at the mesmerizing Mount Etna (the active stratovolcano which dominates Sicily’s skyline like a brooding watchdog), spend your days relaxing at the luxurious Hotel Avalon Sikani, nestled in the picturesque town of Gioiosa Marea. 

This four-star resort sits on Sicily’s northern coast, better known as the Costa Saracena. What does this mean for you? As a guest as this deluxe hotel, you’ll be able to feast your eyes upon breath-taking views of the Tyrrhenian Sea and the impossibly beautiful Aeolian islands. 

Gioiosa Marea is also widely considered the pearl of the Tyrrhenian – the perfect springboard for visiting sites such as the Nebrodi Mountains, the city of Cefalu and the town of Taormina. The area offers ample opportunity both for relaxing and venturing off to some of Sicily’s must-sees.
whats_included: Return flights from the UK
A relaxing 7-night stay at the 4 Star Hotel Avalon Sikani
Stay in a Double Or Twin Standard
Enjoy half board basis throughout your trip

highlights: Catch some rays at Sicily’s most exquisite beaches – kilometres of sand and quasi-transparent waters make it almost impossible not to swim and sunbathe for hours on end.
Marvel at views of the teal-coloured Tyrrhenian from the comfort of your four-star abode
Revel in the historical sights of Sicily, including the Valley of the Temples and the Cappella Palatina – both of which offer a true insight into the colourful past of this island
Stay active by going trekking in the mountains or hiking close to Mount Etna, a dramatic and formerly lava-spewing feature of Sicily’s skyline which is breath-taking to behold.

accommodations.name: Hotel Avalon Sikani
accommodations.description:
Hotel Avalon Sikani

 Favourably situated on the scenic hills of Gioiosa Marea, on the northern shore of Sicily, the lavish 4-star Avalon Sikani Resort boasts the private beach and the astonishing views of the sea and the Aeolian Islands that makes it a perfect place for calming as more as possible stay.

Enjoy the Avalon Sikani Resort’s large contemporary designed rooms with the touches of the traditional Mediterranean warm colours. All rooms are equipped with the modern comforts including complimentary wireless Internet and air conditioning.

Inside and open-air swimming pools, solarium, diving, fishing make the smallest list you can do while living at the hotel. During the day make use of the Avalon Sikani Resort’s rich poolside bars.

title: Florence Getaway With Breakfast & Flights
description:
Home to architectural masterpieces such as Giotto’s iconic bell tower and the mighty terracotta-tiled Duomo cathedral, Florence’s beauty is not to be under-estimated. As the capital of the Italian region of Tuscany, it was once referred to as “the Athens of the Middle Ages” and is not only the birthplace of the Renaissance, but also one of the top 15 fashion capitals in the world.

With credentials such as these, holidaymakers flock to fabulous Firenze (the Italian name for Florence) every year in search of enchanting historical gems, out-of-this-world art and mouth-watering Tuscan cuisine.

Described by UNESCO as “the greatest concentration of universally renowned works of art in the world”, Florence is one of those places that is revered across the globe as the crème de la crème of art and architecture. Go and see if for yourself and by doing so Florence and its art will become part of you and part of your life! 

Your time in Italy will be spent at The Rivoli Boutique Hotel (Traveller's Choice 2022), an ancient 14th century Franciscan monastery, transformed into an elegant 4-star hotel that will welcome you in the city of the Renaissance for an unforgettable experience. The hotel is located in the historic centre within walking distance from everything you want to visit, admire and love in Florence.

Let yourself be embraced by the elegant warmth of their sitting rooms, relax on their sofas or sip a drink in the charming internal courtyard, a “secret garden” with a swimming pool far from the city’s noises and bustle.

Take a tour of the best flavors and fragrances that Italian and Tuscan cuisine can offer at the Ristorante Benedicta. You will find a refined menu featuring seasonal flavors and an outstanding wine list for a superb gourmet d

title: Four Incredible Nights In Florence And Venice
description:
Your adventure begins in Florence, one of the major economic centres and tourist hubs of Italy, located in Tuscany, north of the Chianti region. The Duomo di Firenze, Florence’s iconic symbol, is a cathedral etched onto millions of postcards worldwide and a product of the renaissance. Then, Giotto’s Tower offers a stunning 360 degree view of the city’s surrounding areas in all their glory, and the Palazzo Vecchio, located in the Piazza Signoria,is where fine art, sculptures and murals dwell peacefully. This lively square will have you darting between the various shops and cafes dotted along its edges and marveling at its range of statues. Plus, don’t forget to pay a visit to the Santa Croce church which holds the monumental tombs of Galileo, Michelangelo and many others, and the Boboli Gardens which are home to fascinating sculptures and incredible views of the city. 

After a memorable 2 nights stay in Florence’s vibrant core, you’ll find yourself strolling alongside the curling, teal-coloured canals of Venice for a further two blissful nights. Listed as a World Heritage Site, Venice is situated across a group of 118 small islands, enabling visitors to hop between them via sparkly canals and dinky bridges. Churches, palaces and an endless supply of Cucina Italiana and buttery pastaadorn the narrow, cobbled backstreets, and gondolas and vaporetti (water buses) sit bobbing along the ripples of the canals, eager for hopeless romantics to hop on in. 

You’re truly spoilt for choice when it comes to activities. Discover the treasures of St Mark’s Basilica or take a trip to Doge’s Palace and the Bell Tower of St Mark which offers unparalleled views of the enticing lagoon. Go island hopping to Murano, Burano and Torcello, three breathtaking pieces of land a mere boat ride away. Visit the exquisite glass museum in Murano, gaze at the dreamy, pastel-colored houses of Burano and wander the quaint streets of Torcello and its famous church. 

You’ll rest your weary feet at two top-quality hotels throughout your holiday. In Florence, you will stay at the 4 star Diana Park Hotel. A few steps from the Renaissance masterpieces of Florence, you can breathe air of a charming private hotel, in a good position to visit all the attractions of downtown Florence, dine out in then best restaurants and take advantage of personalised excursions to visit the surrounding Tuscan countryside. The architectural details of the hall, enriched by marbles, antique carpets and decorated stuccos, create a sophisticated and welcoming atmosphere.

Completely renewed, the Hotel Holiday offers 89 spacious rooms. All rooms in the hotel offer modern comforts such as wi-fi connection, air conditioning,TV Sat and LCD. En-suite facilities include marble bathrooms with hair dryer and towel warming heaters.

title: Full Board Sicily Break
description:
Sicily’s capital (and largest city) is Palermo – a spellbinding metropolis home to Italy’s largest opera house (the Teatro Massimo) and centuries-old cathedrals and palaces. 

An eclectic mix of Byzantine mosaics, thronging marketplaces and baroque churches make Palermo a real feast for the senses. Explore the city’s vibrant, historic corners and crevices – including the 12th century Cathedral and 9th century Norman Palace – during your seven-night stay here at the 4* CDS Terrasini Resort. 

Fringed by acres and acres of picture-perfect garden landscape, the CDS Terrasini boasts beautiful views of the Gulf of Castellammare (plus the famous “Toboggan” water slide leading into the balmy Gulf) as well as three different swimming pools. 

When you’re not sunbathing or shimmying into azure-coloured waters via the slide, load up on Italian delicacies at the restaurant, pamper yourself at the wellness centre or soak up the views from the solarium. The resort is also conveniently located, with all the major airports, ports and cultural sights a short journey away.

Get up close to some of Palermo’s sights and delights, including the Cattedrale di Palermo and the Palazzo dei Normanni. You can also head to the Ballarò street market and stock up on keepsakes.

 Set in a 27-hectare park overlooking the Gulf of Castellammare, Città del Mare Resort Village offers accommodation in Terrasini, 19 km from Palermo Airport. Città del Mare Resort Village is a 40-minute drive from Palermo and Scopello.

Guests have free access to the Toboggan, which guarantees a unique experience with its pools connected by water slides running down a cliff directly into the crystal clear water of the Gulf of Castellammare. Various entertainment activities and sports facilities are also available.

title: Half Board Stay In Ischia With Transfers
description:
Fancy crossing the brilliant blue waters of Italy to a sun-soaked paradise, including breakfast, return flights, transfers and a Four-night boutique hotel stay?  Then you have to head to the tiny Tyrrhenian island of Ischia, the most vibrant islet in the Bay of Naples.

Holidays in Ischia invite you to one of Italy’s best kept secrets. Fondly known as the Capital of European Spas, it’s famous for its spas and it’s no surprise it was once a go to destination for Romans. With its thermal springs, luscious landscape and a wide choice of restaurants, it's no wonder the island of Ischia is always a popular destination for Italy holidays. Located just off the Neapolitan Riviera, here you'll find ample vineyards, small towns and beaches to explore, while the historic Castello Aragonese is a bonus.

During you holiday you will stay at the 4 Star Hermitage Resort & Thermal Spa's a real life oasis, courtesy of its well-kept gardens, thermal pools and top-of-the-range spa. This place is in a peaceful, pine-scented neighbourhood, a 20-minute walk from Ischia Porto’s harbour. It’s less than that to the beach, plus the hotel puts on a free shuttle bus there and back. The hotel draws on Ischia’s relaxing reputation, feeding its pools from the island’s underground springs, offering mud spa treatments and a hydrotherapy circuit with a difference.

accommodations.description:
Hermitage Resort & Thermal Spa

 Just 500 metres from the historic centre of Ischia, Hotel Hermitage boasts a wellness centre, and a Mediterranean garden with sun terraces and 3 thermal pools. All rooms offer a balcony.

Rooms at the Hotel Hermitage & Park Terme include satellite TV and cool tiled floors. Each room has a private bathroom with hairdryer and toiletry set. Some rooms offer sea views.

At the Cinthia dell'Hermitage spa, guests can book beauty treatments and massages. Facilities include a hot tub, sauna, and Turkish bath. WiFi is available in public areas.

Breakfast is an extensive buffet including sweet and savoury food. The restaurant serves local and international cuisine for lunch and dinner. In fine weather meals are served on the terrace.

title: Half Board Stay In Sensational Sardinia With Flights
description:
The Italian island of Sardinia sits within the Tyrrhenian Sea between the Balearic Islands, the Italian peninsula and Corsica. Boasting nearly 2,000km of coastline, pearly-white beaches and a rugged interior landscape which invites endless wandering, Sardinia is the perfect getaway for beach-hoppers and thrill-seekers alike.

Although certainly picturesque, eye candy isn’t Sardinia’s only redeeming factor – the island is rich in history too! Dotted within its undulating landscapes are thousands of nuraghi (Bronze Age stone ruins which look like beehives) – one of which dates all the way back to 1500 B.C.

When you’re not combing the countryside for Nuraghi, spend your time flitting between sun-kissed beaches (such as Budoni or Stintino) or island-hopping to the Maddalena archipelago or Asinara National Park, famous for its albino donkey population. 

You can also head off hiking in the Monte Limbara mountain range, take to the open seas during a sailing trip along the sparkling Costa Smeralda and cap off fun-filled days with succulent, mouth-watering local cuisine.

Expect to see plates piled high with culurgiones (similar to ravioli), malloreddus (a type of gnocchi) and salsiccia di cinghiale (wild boar sausage) – you’ll come to realise that restaurants, markets and cafes are an absolute feast for the senses here. 

By night, rest your head at the Blu Hotel Laconia Village. Its convenient location (2km from the centre, 50m from the beach and 15km from bustling Porto Cervo) makes it the perfect place for serendipitous strolls along the shores of the Costa Smeralda and daytime jaunts to dinky Sardinian cafes and local markets.

Plant yourself on a sunbed by the twinkling pool or meander down to the beach for a swim. Work up an appetite by taking advantage of the hotel’s extensive sports facilities; try your hand at tennis, football, beach volleyball or bowls to get your blood pumping, before cooling off with a mid-afternoon dip in the teal-coloured sea.

Set your taste buds tingling with tasty local cuisine, such as culurgiones and salsiccia di cinghiale

accommodations.name: Blu Hotel Laconia Village, Sardinia
accommodations.description:
Blu Hotel Laconia Village, Sardinia

 Part of the prestigious Blu Hotels family, the Laconia Village occupies a superb spot on Sardinia's northern coastline, just moments from the beach. Suited to couples and families alike, there's a wide range of facilities to enjoy - and the seasonal entertainment programme is a real highlight. The hotel is approximately 170m from its own private beach.

title: Half Board Stay In Sorrento With Flights
description:
Book a 3-night holiday in Sorrento with Half Board - Save £200 per person!

Nestled on Southern Italy’s rugged Amalfi Coast is Sorrento, a picture-perfect hilltop town overlooking the turquoise glow of the Bay of Naples. Here, the fresh scent of gnocchi all a Sorrentina wafts through the air, locals bustle about in quirky antique stores and tourists swarm to the glorious shores like bees to honey. Should they look out into the horizon, they’ll see the enormous shadow of Mount Vesuvius looming in the distance. 

Scattered around Sorrento are colourful ports and sun-soaked beaches sitting beneath rows of honey-coloured houses and shop fronts, selling anything from ceramics to lacework. Dickens, Tolstoy and the poet Byron holidayed here, self-confessed addicts to the salt-tinged Sorrentine air. 

Wander around the Piazza Tasso, splurge at the shopping district on Via San Cesareo and make sure you cap off your days with a bowl or two of sensational gnocchi alla sorrentina. For dessert, gobble up the typical cake of the region known as la pastiera and round off your evening with an ice-cold shot of Limoncelloin true Italian style. 

Located in one of the most beautiful bay of Sorrento Peninsula, Mar Hotel Alimuri offers wonderful panoramic views of its own private sandy beach. The hotel comprises a total of 95 rooms, 90% of which have a sea view. 

In the evening, the piano bar opens, or you can sample the nightlife in the center of town; many of the restaurants and bars offer live music shows.

Let the taste of traditional delights such asla pastiera, gnocchi all asorrentina and limoncello sweep you off your feet.

title: Holidays to Historic Centre Of Florence
description:
Home to architectural masterpieces such as Giotto’s iconic bell tower and the mighty terracotta-tiled Duomo cathedral, Florence’s beauty is not to be under-estimated. As the capital of the Italian region of Tuscany, it was once referred to as “the Athens of the Middle Ages” and is not only the birthplace of the Renaissance, but also one of the top 15 fashion capitals in the world.

With credentials such as these, holidaymakers flock to fabulous Firenze (the Italian name for Florence) every year in search of enchanting historical gems, out-of-this-world art and mouth-watering Tuscan cuisine.

Described by UNESCO as “the greatest concentration of universally renowned works of art in the world”, Florence is one of those places that is revered across the globe as the crème de la crème of art and architecture. Go and see if for yourself and by doing so Florence and its art will become part of you and part of your life! 

Your time in Italy will be spent at The hotel Pitti Palace al Ponte Vecchio. This 4 star hotel enjoys a central location in Florence, only a few steps away from the famous bridge Ponte Vecchio. Other attractions such as Uffizi Gallery and Basilica di Santa Maria del Fiore as well as the main station are located within walking distance from the hotel.

title: Ischia Elegance and Capri Charm  A Journey Of Sun Sea and Serenity
description:
Discover the timeless charm of Ischia with a special offer that combines relaxation, adventure, and wellness. Stay at Hotel Punta Imperatore 4*, a slice of paradise located in the stunning Citara Bay, just 12 steps from the sea. Thanks to its prime panoramic position, you can enjoy spectacular sunsets and, if you're lucky, witness the magical “Green Flash” of Ischia. Unwind in the hotel’s ozone-treated pool with hydromassage or relax on the equipped solarium, where you can indulge in moments of pure tranquility. 

The offer also includes two unforgettable experiences: a full day on the island of Capri, exploring its breathtaking landscapes, charming streets, and unique atmosphere, and a walk through the picturesque village of Sant’Angelo with a tasting of local limoncello, immersing yourself in the authentic flavors and scents of the island. 

To further enrich your stay, you can choose from many optional experiences available on-site, such as a mini-cruise along the coast, an excursion to the enchanting island of Procida, and many other exciting activities to make your vacation even more special. Hotel Punta Imperatore is the perfect starting point for a holiday that combines luxury, nature, and culture. Don’t miss this opportunity to discover the best of Ischia, Capri, and the surrounding wonders.

title: Lipari Island Between Sea and Fire
description:
Let yourself be embraced by the timeless magic of the Aeolian Islands, a natural paradise suspended between turquoise waters, volcanic landscapes, and endless sunsets. Our exclusive offer takes you to Lipari, the vibrant heart of the archipelago, for an unforgettable 4-night stay at Hotel A Pinnata, a property renowned for its unique panoramic location and authentic Aeolian hospitality.Staying in a beautiful sea-view room, you will wake up each day to the horizon where sky and water blend seamlessly, and enjoy a rich, delicious breakfast.

 Upon arrival, a welcome aperitif will introduce you to the warm, relaxing atmosphere of the hotel, overlooking the picturesque Pignataro harbor and surrounded by the vivid colors of the Mediterranean. The offer includes round-trip transfers with maritime passage directly to the hotel, ensuring a smooth and carefree journey. You will also experience something truly unforgettable: a full day in Stromboli, the island known for its “sciara di fuoco,” where you can witness the primordial power of the active volcano illuminating the night with spectacular eruptions.Between crystal-clear waters, whitewashed villages, volcanic scenery, and charming hospitality, this escape to the Aeolian Islands invites you to rediscover the genuine beauty of nature—enhanced by the elegance and comfort of Hotel A Pinnata. A holiday you’ll never forget.

Stromboli’s iconic volcano, one of the world’s most active, offering spectacular nighttime eruptions
“Sciara di Fuoco” – a rare natural phenomenon where glowing lava flows dramatically down the volcano’s slope

Visit the Mud Baths area and the Black Sand Beach

title: Luxury Ischia Holiday With Half Board Basis
description:
Capri’s lesser-known neighbour, Ischia, is actually one of Campania’s finest destinations. Famous for its natural beauty, Ischia is also renowned for its rich thermal-mineral waters. The prodigious properties of Ischia’s waters have been well-known since ancient Roman times and even then, the island was probably one of the most famous thermal stations for the healing of both body and soul. Ischia is tradition, hospitality and undisputed beauty to be appreciated with your own eyes and enjoyed at your own pleasure.

The island boasts delightful views over the sparkling Mediterranean and fine sandy beaches. Holidays to Ischia are ideal for those looking for a respite with the islands fantastic beaches and range of exclusive spas.

The 5 Star Travellers' Choice 2020 Hotel Terme Mare Blu is housed in a majestic and uniquely charming villa. The sophisticated architecture of the 19th century building is perfectly matched by the excellence of the facilities provided. As a former aristocratic villa, the hotel has modernised yet preserved the elegance of its former life.

On leaving the lobby you will find yourself in the luxurious garden of the villa where smells and colours typical of the Island welcome you to two outdoor pools, one thermal water and one freshwater.

Staying at the Hotel Terme Mare Blu is the best way to discover Ischia, the island of timeless fascination.

The sunny resort features comfortable rooms equipped with modern conveniences, as well as quiet areas including a garden with a gazebo, some common rooms, and pool areas. 

The water in the thermal baths is kept at a constant temperature of 36°C. The spa includes a Turkish bath, hydrotherapy pools, and hydro massage showers and baths.

The in house restaurant serves up impressive cuisine, while therapeutic treatments are offered at the wellness centre.

title: Puglia: Your Perfect Italian Escape by the Sea
description:
Forming the heel of Italy's boot is Puglia – clad with hill towns, centuries old farmland, iridescent coastline and topaz-hued waters. The vibrant port of Bari (Puglia's capital) throngs with university students; the town of Lecce is rich with baroque architecture (resulting in the area being dubbed the Florence of the South) and Alberobello, brimming with cone-shaped rooves, invites endless wandering. 

Prepare to spend seven nights in the glorious town of Salento, home to the sensational seaside gems of Gallipoli and Otranto – real must-sees if you’re fortunate enough to visit the “boot" of the bel paese. 

Nestled just 800 metres from the historic centre of Otranto is your hotel, the Basiliani Resort and Spa. It’s also within spitting distance to the cathedral and medieval castle, making it the perfect springboard for historical sightseeing. 

The hotel also boasts a wellness centre (the biggest in Salento) where you can banish away those aches and pains with massages. After a treatment or two, lounge about on the pearly-white beaches just a stone’s throw from the hotel. 

Salento itself is a glistening haven filled with unspoiled sleepy towns and an interior area which is fundamental for the production of olive oil and wine, offering its visitors plenty to do (and sample!). Along its craggy and undulating coastline, you can find a whole range of different natural treasures – from golden sands to Karstic grottoes and saltwater lagoons. 

And if you’re more of a history buff than a sun seeker, Salento's sleepy towns are full of historic Greek remnants dating back to thousands of years ago – indeed, you'll find that the Greeks have left their footprints on the cuisine, culture and religion of the area.

title: Romantic Venice Historic Rome and Beaches of Ischia
description:
Venice is a city known for it beautiful architecture, art works and its stunning location. The city is listed as a World Heritage Site with its lagoon. It is known as the ‘Most romantic city in Europe’ as well as the City of Bridges, City of Water and the Floating City. The Smart Hotel Holiday is a comfy design hotel located few minutes far from Venice city centre. Easy to reach from Venezia-Mestre highway exit, this hotel is the ideal base for all those who are travelling by car and want to visit the wonderful Venice and the other cities in the surroundings.

The second half will be spent in Rome has an immensely rich historical heritage and its cosmopolitan atmosphere, makes it one of Europe's and the world's most visited and beautiful capital cities. The ARS Hotel has the character of a boutique hotel. It is ideally situated in the Citta Giardino residential area, in Rome's quiet and green Monte Sacro district, which makes it a peaceful haven away from the bustle and noise of Rome's hectic tourist areas. This hotel is housed in a beautiful four-storey villa surrounded by a small but beautiful garden that offers superb panoramic views. 

Lastly you have to head to the tiny Tyrrhenian island of Ischia, the most vibrant islet in the Bay of Naples. Ischia faces the gulf of Naples and is part of the Phlegraean island group generated by powerful underwater volcanoes, along with Procida and the deserted Vivara. Here you will experience and discover the fantastic world that awaits you at  Hermitage Resort & Thermal Spa, a real life oasis, courtesy of its well-kept gardens, thermal pools and top-of-the-range spa. This place is in a peaceful, pine-scented neighbourhood, a 20-minute walk from Ischia Porto’s harbour. It’s less than that to the beach, plus the hotel puts on a free shuttle bus there and back. The hotel draws on Ischia’s relaxing reputation, feeding its pools from the island’s underground springs, offering mud spa treatments and a hydrotherapy circuit with a difference.

Hermitage Resort & Thermal Spa

 Just 500 metres from the historic centre of Ischia, Hotel Hermitage boasts a wellness centre, and a Mediterranean garden with sun terraces and 3 thermal pools. All rooms offer a balcony.

Rooms at the Hotel Hermitage & Park Terme include satellite TV and cool tiled floors. Each room has a private bathroom with hairdryer and toiletry set. Some rooms offer sea views.

title: Romantic Venice and Delightful Lake Garda Twin Centre
description:
On this twin-city Italy vacation you can explore the beautiful sites of Venice before winding down in a hotel overlooking the picturesque Lake Garda.

Located in the northeast of Italy, Venice is a romantic and enchanting city of turquoise canals, ancient palaces and serenading gondoliers.  With its tranquil canals, crooked buildings, and lively festivals this floating city is a beautiful world heritage site and a must visit location. Listed as a World Heritage Site, the city's contributions to art, architecture and music are evident around every corner.

The first half of your holiday will be spent at the 4 Star Smart Hotel Holiday which is an ideal choice for travellers seeking a 4-star hotel in Mestre within reach of Venice in just 10 minutes. Conveniently situated in the Mestre part of Venice, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 4-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

Travelling by train, you’ll spend the second half of your stay in Riva del Garda, Lake Garda. Your stay in Lake Garda will be at the 4 Star Antico Borgo Hotel. This hotel is an elegant building nestled in the historical town centre of Riva del Garda, against the unique backdrop of the mountains and one of Italy’s most beautiful lakes. Combining chic accommodation with a central location, this is the perfect choice for those looking for the comfort and convenience.

title: Rome And Florence With Train Ride And Breakfast
description:
During this holiday,  you can enjoy the famous landmarks in Rome, such as the Colosseum and Trevi Fountain, and you can also immerse yourself in the artistic culture that embodies Florence and perhaps visit famous masterpieces, such as the statue of David at the Accademia Gallery.

First up, we fly you to the Eternal City of Rome for two nights. With round-the-clock energy and jaw-dropping views, Rome offers everything you’ve been dreaming of. Hiding more secrets than its many emperors, from the centre of civilisation to the Roman Empire, this glam city is the hub of awe and wonder.

During this fantastic holiday you will stay at the four-star ARS Hotel. This beautiful historic villa is located in Rome’s Monte Sacro district, just a 20 minute bus ride from Termini Railway Station. This hotel is housed in a beautiful four-storey villa surrounded by a small but beautiful garden that offers superb panoramic views. The Hotel “ARS Hotel” is a remarkable example of a building designed in the immediate recovery of the early Twentieth Century.

After spending two nights in Rome, next you’ll stop for two nights in Florence, the artistic heart of Italy and the birthplace of the Renaissance in Europe. Here your stay will be at the 4 Star MH Florence Hotel (Travellers' Choice 2023). It is a newly built establishment situated in the heart of Florence, just 150 metres from the central SMN station and a 3-minute walk from the city's main monuments. Mixing modern touches together with the city's traditional elegance, its white and beige interiors will make you feel relaxed as soon as you cross the threshold. Spend some time between the spa's choice of saunas after an invigorating dip in the hotel's cold pool. To complete the perfect day, head up to the hotel's sixth-floor terrace lounge to enjoy a 360 degree panorama of the city, cocktail in hand.
whats_included: We take care of travel with return flights from the UK
2 nights accommodation at the 4 Star Best Western Ars Hotel, Rome
Train ride across the majestic scenery from Rome to Florence
2 nights accommodation at the 4 Star MH Florence Hotel (Travellers' Choice 2023)
A stay in Italy includes daily breakfast at both the hotels
highlights: Two Italian cities for the price of one with 4 star hotels
See Rome’s endless treasures from the Colosseum to the Forum
Marvel at the Sistine Chapel and its fresco by Michelangelo
Throw a coin into the Trevi Fountain to ensure your return
Train journey takes you through breathtaking scenery
Discover Florence’s treasures from Ponte Vecchio to Uffizi courtyard
For a bird’s eye view, climb up into Brunelleschi's magnificent dome
Behold Michelangelo’s masterpiece at the Galleria dell'Accademia

accommodations.name: Best Western ARS Hotel, Rome
accommodations.description:
Best Western ARS Hotel, Rome

 The Best Western ARS Hotel has the character of a boutique hotel. It is ideally situated in the Citta Giardino residential area, in Rome's quiet and green Monte Sacro district, which makes it a peaceful haven away from the bustle and noise of Rome's hectic tourist areas.

This hotel is housed in a beautiful four-storey villa surrounded by a small but beautiful garden that offers superb panoramic views. Getting into the city centre is easy with the Sempione bus stop a few minutes walk, where the 90 Express will take you to Termini Station.

The rooms are all spacious and bright and are furnished with a large bathroom with shower, direct dial telephone, lcd television with satellite channels, media set premium tv ,air conditioning, mini fridge , safe and intern

accommodations.name: MH Florence Hotel & Spa
accommodations.description:
MH Florence Hotel & Spa

 MH Florence Hotel is a newly built, located in the heart of Florence and only 3-minute walk from the main monuments of the city.

The hotel has 39 rooms, standard, superior, family double designed with a modern and elegantly finished. Every air-conditioned room comes with parquet floors and a flat-screen TV, while some also feature a sofa.

Flagship of the hotel is the SPA, a relaxing space where guests can enjoy an intimate swimming pool,Kneipp path, the Bio Sauna, bath and turn the relaxation area or indulge in a relaxing massage after a day of work or long walks to the center. Guests can also access a terrace and lounge area.

title: Rome And Sorrento Twin Centre With Scenic Train Journey
description:
Italy is all about baroque statues, mouth watering cuisine and quaint beachside havens. On this twin-centre retreat, you’ll have the perfect balance – staying first in the city and then onto the Bay of Naples in south western Italy with its sandy/pebble beaches. Your Italian holiday will include train ride so you’ll have the unique chance to thunder towards the coast.

You’ll begin your fantastic break at the four-star hotel in Rome. Best Western ARS Hotel has the character of a boutique hotel. It is ideally situated in the Citta Giardino residential area, in Rome's quiet and green Monte Sacro district, which makes it a peaceful haven away from the bustle and noise of Rome's hectic tourist areas. This hotel is housed in a beautiful four-storey villa surrounded by a small but beautiful garden that offers superb panoramic views. 

After exploring Rome, you’ll take our unforgettable train ride to Sorrento. Here you will stay at the 4 Star Mar Hotel Alimuri, Sorrento. Located in one of the most beautiful bay of Sorrento Peninsula, Mar Hotel Alimuri offers wonderful panoramic views of its own private sandy beach. Set in Alimuri bay, the hotel is just a few steps from the beach, restaurants and bars. During the day you can relax while overlooking the beach and the surrounding area from the hotel's terrace, with a drink from the bar.  Alternatively you can rejuvenate yourself with a trip to the hotel's spa center, where you can unwind in the sauna, or choose one of the many beauty treatments offered.

Find the blockbuster gem of Pompeii at the Bay of Naples
Peer into the crater of Vesuvius for an unforgettable hike
Make your way down 200 steps to Marina Piccola, worth the trek!

title: Rome to Sicily – A Mediterranean Journey
description:
Begin your Italian escape in Rome, a city where ancient history and vibrant modern life exist side by side. Spend two unforgettable nights exploring iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, wandering through charming piazzas and tossing a coin into the Trevi Fountain to ensure your return.

Enjoy Big Bus Rome Hop-On Hop-Off Tour in Rome, Discover the secrets of Ancient Rome as you explore the Eternal City on a hop-on hop-off sightseeing tour that endeavours to show you the most famous landmarks in the city.

Discover the treasures of Vatican City, home to St Peter’s Basilica and the world-famous Vatican Museums. Evenings are best spent enjoying authentic Italian cuisine in a traditional trattoria, soaking up Rome’s romantic atmosphere.

Travel south in classic European style aboard an overnight train to Sicily. Relax in your comfortable sleeper compartment as you journey through the Italian countryside. It’s a unique and memorable way to travel, maximising your holiday time while adding a touch of adventure.

Wake up in beautiful Sicily, where Mediterranean sunshine, dramatic landscapes and rich history await. Over four nights, experience the island’s unique blend of Greek, Roman and Norman influences.

Marvel at the mighty Mount Etna, Europe’s highest active volcano, or relax along stunning coastal shores with crystal-clear waters. Explore the vibrant markets and historic architecture of Palermo, or visit elegant Taormina, famous for its ancient theatre and breathtaking sea views.
excerpt: This perfectly balanced 7-night Italian getaway combines the timeless grandeur of Rome with the laid-back charm of Sicily. Ideal for British travellers seeking culture, history, sunshine and superb food, this itinerary blends iconic sightseeing with authentic local experiences — all wrapped up with the comfort of seamless rail travel.

Visit Vatican City, home to St Peter’s Basilica and priceless Renaissance masterpieces.

Explore the vibrant markets and historic streets of Palermo.
Relax on sun-drenched Mediterranean beaches with crystal-clear waters.
Indulge in Sicilian specialities including arancini, fresh seafood, cannoli and local wines.

accommodations.name: Club House Hotel Rome
accommodations.description: Welcome to the c-hotels Club House, the right choice for your stay in Rome. Strategically located a few steps from the Cornelia Metro station, you can quickly reach the main tourist attractions. A few Metro stops you come across the majesty of St. Peter's Basilica and the suggestive Sistine Chapel with the Vatican Museums, the Trevi Fountain and the main shopping streets. A large bus terminal is only 100 meters from the hotel and for those coming by car the hotel has a convenient parking area. The totally renovated c-hotels Club House offers free Wi-Fi, 24-hour reception/concierge service and a Lounge Bar where you can enjoy excellent drinks and appetizing aperitifs. The new design rooms are equipped with flat-screen TVs, air conditioning, safes and minibars. It is possible to start the day by taking advantage of our inviting breakfast. At c-hotels Club House it is possible to live a magical experience in Rome.

title: Sardinia Escape: Sun, Sea, And Light All Inclusive Convenience
description:
Escape to Paradise: 4 Nights Light All Inclusive at Club Esse Shardana!

Discover the beauty of Sardinia with a 4-night getaway at Club Esse Shardana. Nestled in Baia di Santa Reparata, this coastal haven offers direct access to crystal-clear waters, stunning sea views, and tranquil beaches.

Indulge in delicious buffet-style breakfasts and dinners featuring regional Sardinian delights and international favorites. Spend your days relaxing by the outdoor pool, exploring nearby Capo Testa, or enjoying water activities like snorkeling and diving.

Perfect for couples, families, and nature lovers, this Light All Inclusive escape combines relaxation, adventure, and unforgettable Mediterranean charm.

Sardinia is calling – are you ready for the dream getaway?

accommodations.name: Club Esse Shardana
accommodations.description:
Club Esse Shardana

 Club Esse Shardana is a 4-star resort located in Santa Teresa di Gallura, Sardinia, Italy. Nestled between the rocks and the sea, the resort offers direct access to a sandy beach with shallow waters, making it ideal for swimming and relaxation. The property features an outdoor swimming pool with a solarium, providing guests with sun umbrellas, sunbeds, and deck chairs. 

The resort's air-conditioned restaurant boasts panoramic sea views and a terrace for outdoor dining. Guests can enjoy buffet-style meals featuring regional and international dishes, including appetizers, main courses, Italian pizza, fruits, and desserts. Theme nights and a typical Sardinian evening are regularly featured.

title: Sardinia Holiday with All Inclusive Board Basis
description:
If you’re looking for a region full to the brim with history and beauty, Sardinia should be the first name on your lips. This is an amazing island with jaw dropping beauty and the ability to mesmerise with its charm is definitely god’s masterpiece. It’s unspoilt coastline renowned for beautiful beaches, translucent azure blue sea and fascinating rock formations need no introduction. It is the second largest island in the Mediterranean and fiercely proud of its unique identity. If you’re looking for a break with plenty of peace and tranquillity, holidays to Sardinia could be just what the doctor ordered! While the mainland is buzzing 24 hours a day, the laid-back attitude is perfect for those holidaying with children or couples sneaking a romantic escape. Blessed with some of the most beautiful beaches in the Mediterranean, there are plenty of places where you can top up your tan, from quiet, secluded coves with silvery sands, to spacious beaches with water sports on tap.

Located opposite the island of Asinara, overlooking one of the most stunning beaches in the area, the MClub Del Golfo is surrounded by lush vegetation, offering guests an exclusive stay in contact with uncontaminated nature. The beach, just a few metres from the hotel, is equipped with sun umbrellas and sun loungers and there are bars nearby for a coffee, ice cream or a refreshing drink between swims.
whats_included: We take care of travel with Return Flights
5 Night accommodation at the 4 Star Hotel MClub Del Golfo
Stay in a Double Standard
Enjoy All Inclusive Board Basis throughout
highlights: Enjoy the beautiful beaches of Cala dei Ginepri and Le Saline
Visit the picturesque seaside town of Porto Cervo
Tuck into the simple flavours of Sardinian cooking

accommodations.name: MClub Del Golfo
accommodations.description:
MClub Del Golfo

 Facing the beachfront, MClub Del Golfo offers 4-star accommodation in Sorso and has a restaurant, water sports facilities and private beach area. Spiaggia Eden is 70 m from MClub Del Golfo, while Spiaggia Marina di Sorso is 1.5 km from the property. 
At the hotel, all rooms include a wardrobe. All guest rooms at MClub Del Golfo come with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a safety deposit box. Featuring a garden, the 4-star hotel has air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi, each with a private bathroom.
The accommodation offers a children's playground. You can play table tennis and tennis at this 4-star hotel, and the area is popular for windsurfing and canoeing.
A continental, vegetarian or vegan breakfast is available every morning at the property.

title: Sardinia's Seaside Serenity: A Half-Board Escape
description:
Sardinia, an amazing island with jaw dropping beauty and the ability to mesmerise with its charm is definitely god’s masterpiece. Sardinia or in Italian 'Sardegna', is a well known paradise in the middle of the Mediterranean. It’s unspoilt coastline is renowned for beautiful beaches, translucent azure blue sea and fascinating rock formations need no introduction.

A voyage over an emerald sea, past characteristic coves and beaches of snow white sand … this is Sardinia, an island that strikes its visitors with natural contrasts, the lights and colors of a region that boasts old traditions and a wild and pure nature.

During this holiday, you will stay at the Blu Hotel Morisco Village which is about 30 km away from the harbor and the airport of Olbia and with its huge and comfortable areas, is perfect for those who prefer an active holiday. At a short distance from the Costa Smeralda and La Maddalena Archipelago, it’s the perfect place for those who want to live the nature or the beach life.

A wide range of sport activities are provided by the entertainment staff for those who love a dynamic life, whereas every evening a pleasant bar with piano music will delight the guests. The Blu Hotel Morisco is also the ideal venue for families with children who are offered several activities in the pleasant theatre.

title: Serene Sorrento: Peaceful Adults-Only Getaway
description:
Perched on the cliffs of Italy's Amalfi Coast, Sorrento is where azure waves meet lemon groves, where every alley tells a tale, and where the soul finds serenity. Dive into a brief escape, feel the sun-kissed breeze, indulge in local Limoncello, and let the Mediterranean magic envelop you. Pause, breathe, and lose yourself in Sorrento's timeless embrace, even for a short while.

This deal is for a 4-nights stay at the Nastro Azzurro, adults only, on a All inclusive board basis, with flights and return private transfers included!

highlights: Romantic Sunsets: Witness breathtaking sunsets from Sorrento’s clifftops, a moment of romance and serenity.
Tranquil Retreats: No kid's clubs or squeals by the pool. Just pure, uninterrupted relaxation in an adult-focused hotel.
Limoncello Tasting: Delve into the world of Sorrento's signature drink. Visit local distilleries, understand the craft, and enjoy curated tastings.
Exquisite Shopping: Wander through high-end boutiques, artisanal craft stores, and local markets, ensuring a souvenir that's just right for sophisticated tastes.
Embrace the allure of Sorrento, tailored for those who seek an adult-only experience, drenched in culture, luxury, and unforgettable Mediterranean charm.
Nightlife: Experience the vibrant nightlife, from intimate jazz bars to lively dance clubs and rooftop lounges.

Nastro Azzurro - Adults Only

 The Nastro Azzurro & Occhio Marino Resort is located in one of the most mesmerizing areas of the Sorrentine peninsula with wonderful views over both the bay of Naples and that of Salerno.

This newly built adults only resort is situated within a three hectare park brimming with typical Mediterranean vegetation. The resort is made up of two buildings. The main building, Nastro Azzurro, hosts a variety of services including reception, bar and restaurants in addition to 80 rooms. The second building, Occhio Marino, is easily accessible by a pathway through the grounds and has 40 superior rooms, making it the ideal place to relax.

title: Sicily Awaits: Sun Sights And Delicious Delights
description:
The largest of the islands in the Mediterranean, Sicily is a place to experience stunning views, lively cities and serene coasts. For a dreamy island getaway with all the thrill of a city break, holidays in Sicily offer the full package. Displaying the perfect combination of historical sites and sandy beaches, you’ll get the best of both worlds during your holiday, whether you’re a beach bum or a history buff, this city will have something special to offer you. The city’s historic quarter is one of the most compact and captivating in the whole of Sicily, squeezed together in the style of a Moroccan medina, the narrow streets are lined with impressive monuments and landmarks, as well as attractive architectural themes that you come to expect from grand Italy.

The majestic Alicudi Club Hotel is comfortable 4-star accommodation in Sciacca in proximity to Club Lipari. The property lies 4 km to Chiesa di Santa Margherita and 4 km from Museo del Giocattolo Sciacca. The hotel stands a few steps from a fine sand beach and features views of the garden in Sciacca. You can also visit San Calogero, which is 10 minutes' ride away. The Sciacca accommodation offers a nightclub and a seasonal outdoor pool so you could have extra comfort during your stay. Guests can make use of windsurfing, canoeing and archery along with cars.
